title: Melted Russian Beef Skewers
description: A flavorful and tender skewer dish inspired by Russian cuisine, with a smoky twist.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, mix ground beef with onion and smoky paprika.
3. Thread the beef mixture onto skewers, leaving some space between each piece.
4. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked to 63°C (145°F) for medium-rare.
5. During the last 2 minutes of grilling, place mozzarella cheese on top of the beef.
6. Remove skewers from grill and let rest for 2-3 minutes.
7. Serve immediately, garnished with additional onion if desired.
8. Enjoy your melted Russian beef skewers!
